🔥⚽ *MMU Kronos Alumni Cup 2025* 🏆
📅 *6 Sept 2025 | 7AM – 7PM*
📍 *MMU Cyberjaya Stadium* – Football Field

⚡ *20 Teams in Total* – 10 Veteran + 10 Semi-Veteran
👥 *15 players per team*
💰 *RM 40 per player (RM 600 per team)*
🗓 *Deadline: 28 Aug 2025* – Secure your spot now!

🏅 *TROPHIES & MEDALS* for the champions
💵 Cash prizes to sweeten the victory
👕 *FREE exclusive Kronos shirt* for every player

📢 *Reunite. Compete. Relive the glory.*
One stadium. One day. 20 teams battling for ultimate bragging rights! 💪🔥

📞 *For more details & registration, contact Afiq*: +60 11-1024 1217
📝 *Register here*: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScQ7ETyNpXoUembNXCmv-ryNrouamI92O-Jt_wDb00gEDddAQ/viewform

As representatives of the MMUFC community and Multimedia University students, we extend our heartfelt support to Faisal Halim during this challenging time. His well-being and swift recovery are paramount to us, and our thoughts and prayers are with him and his loved ones.

We stand united in condemning the unfortunate incident involving Faisal Halim and echo the call for accountability and justice. As members of the football community, we uphold the values of respect, sportsmanship, and fair play, and we expect nothing less from those involved in the sport.

Faisal Halim has our full support, and we trust that the Football Association of Malaysia (FAM) and the relevant authorities will conduct a thorough investigation to ensure that those responsible are held accountable. 

Together, as a community, let us rally behind Faisal Halim and demonstrate our unwavering solidarity. We wish him strength and courage during his recovery process and look forward to seeing him back on the field doing what he loves.

Adam Adnan
MMUFC's President
